recommendations.title: Enhance Climate Risk Disclosure in BRSR FY26
recommendations.description: Proactively disclose detailed climate risk management and transition plans in BRSR FY26 filing to avoid SEBI scrutiny and potential trading restrictions.
recommendations.profitability_link: Avoid potential cost of capital increase by 20-40 bps, preventing ₹50-100 Cr in additional financing costs

recommendations.title: Set and Announce 2030 Net-Zero Target
recommendations.description: Adani Power should publicly commit to a 2030 net-zero emissions target with a science-based pathway to improve ESG scores and investor confidence, following JSW Energy's lead.
recommendations.profitability_link: Improved ESG rating could reduce cost of capital by 20-40 bps, saving ₹50-100 Cr annually in interest expenses
recommendations.peer_benchmark: JSW Energy announced 2030 net-zero target with science-based pathway, leading to 15% ESG score uplift

recommendations.title: Issue Green Bond to Fund Clean Energy Projects
recommendations.description: Raise ₹2000 Cr via green bonds to finance renewable energy capacity expansion, leveraging lower interest rates due to improved ESG positioning.
recommendations.profitability_link: Expected interest rate discount of 50 bps on ₹2000 Cr saves ₹10 Cr annually in interest costs
recommendations.peer_benchmark: JSW Energy issued ₹2000 Cr green bond at 50bps discount

recommendations.title: Integrate ESG Factors into Valuation Models
recommendations.description: Incorporate ESG risks and opportunities into DCF and cost of capital models to better reflect climate transition risks and attract ESG-focused investors.
recommendations.profitability_link: Improved investor confidence could reduce P/E compression by 5-10%, enhancing market cap by ₹500-1000 Cr

immediate_low.title: Enhance Climate Risk Disclosure in BRSR FY26
